description.ko: 투명한 해파리 형상들이 고요한 밀도 깔때기 주위를 맴돌고, 거품과 생물발광 해류가 심해의 잔잔한 움직임을 드러냅니다.
description.en: Transparent jellyfish forms circle a quiet density funnel, where bubbles and bioluminescent currents reveal the calm motion of the deep sea.

prompt: Deep Ocean artwork for AQUA-5: an intimate near-field view of a suspended hourglass-shaped density funnel in the midnight zone, far from any seabed, vent, vessel, ruin, or machinery. Two slow laminar currents meet nose-to-nose and pinch the water into a narrow glowing waist, with #006994 blue-green flow bands curving inward against a surrounding #000080 abyss. Translucent jellyfish forms drift around the constriction like living glass bells and folded silk veils, their faint radial veins visible through layered gelatin bodies; fine #40E0D0 bioluminescent edges outline each rim, while muted #48D1CC light pulses travel through their membranes and fade softly into the dark water. Small bubbles reveal the fluid motion by compressing at the waist, then spreading into delicate fan-shaped trails above and below, each bead catching turquoise glow without becoming turbulent. Medium-density luminous plankton particles hang at multiple depths, creating a calm, peaceful dance of transparent deep-sea life with crisp underwater macro detail, soft volumetric radiance, refractive pressure ripples, and measured medium-paced movement.
